Headline: Closure - Hove Park School (State), Brighton and Hove
Info: Brighton and Hove City Council is expected to approve the closure of Hove Park School's Valley Campus, consolidating all pupils onto a single site by September 2028 to address falling pupil numbers and a £1.8 million deficit [3.2.1].

Headline: Closure - Ruthin School, Denbighshire
Info: Following its recent closure announcement, Ruthin School officially entered administration on 6 July with FRP Advisory appointed to wind down affairs, resulting in the redundancy of the majority of its staff.

Headline: Closure - Isle of Wight Schools (State), Isle of Wight
Info: The local council has been given the go-ahead to draw up official criteria for potential state school closures as part of a broader review into educational provision and capacity on the island.

Headline: Closure - Ruthin School, Denbighshire
Info: The historic 700-year-old independent school has announced it will not reopen after the summer and is entering financial administration, citing rising costs and severe financial pressures [2.1.4].

Headline: Closure - Woodside Primary (State), Runcorn
Info: Parents have spoken out against the potential closure of Woodside Primary, a state school in Halton, which has had its plans for an in-school nursery paused while the local council consults on its future due to falling pupil numbers.
